title: Decree-Law No. 47 of 2002 on the Organisation of the Press, Printing and Publishing
summary: Regulates press, printing and publishing and is relevant to online media because official and secondary sources identify coverage of publishing and permanent or temporary electronic storage.

theme_notes.online_content.online_media_licensing: Core press and publishing law covering electronic storage and publication-related activity.
theme_notes.online_content.content_standards_moderat: Press and publishing content law relevant to online publishing.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Information Technology Crimes Law No. 60 of 2014
